mapper.sql: SELECT P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) TOTAL FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM ,STB ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,DM_DVC_ACC_MST DADM where DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+)

SELECT COUNT(1) TOTAL FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM ,STB STB ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,STB_DTL SD ,DM_ACC_DVC_MST DADM WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SD.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DADM.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
UPPER(#{type})
LOWER(#{type})
SELECT USER_ID ,AUTR_ID FROM AD_USER_AUTR_MAP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT DVH.SEQ_ID , to_char(to_date(dvh.cnsl_dt,'yyyyMMdd'),'yyyy.MM.dd') cnsl_dt , to_char(to_date(dvh.cnsl_tm,'HH24MISS'),'HH24:MI:SS') cnsl_tm , DVH.MEMO FROM DM_VOC_HST DVH , STB STB WHERE 1=1 AND DVH.SVC_NUM = STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM AND STB.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId})

SELECT DVH.SEQ_ID , DVH.CNSL_DT , DVH.CNSL_TM , DVH.CNSL_UNIT_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'CNSL_UNIT_CD' AND DVH.CNSL_UNIT_CD = CD.COMM_CD) CNSL_UNIT_NM , DVH.CNSL_OP_ST_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'CNSL_OP_ST_CD' AND DVH.CNSL_OP_ST_CD = CD.COMM_CD) CNSL_OP_ST_NM , DVH.DABL_OP_ST_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'DABL_OP_ST_CD' AND DVH.DABL_OP_ST_CD = CD.COMM_CD) DABL_OP_ST_NM , DVH.NET_DABL_SER_NUM , DVH.DSAT_CL_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'DSAT_CL_CD' AND DVH.DSAT_CL_CD = CD.COMM_CD) DSAT_CL_NM , DVH.CNSL_CONT_CL_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'CNSL_CONT_CL_CD' AND DVH.CNSL_CONT_CL_CD = CD.COMM_CD) CNSL_CONT_CL_NM , DVH.DABL_RCV_NUM , DVH.PROC_CNT , DVH.MEMO , DVH.SVC_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'SVC_CD' AND DVH.SVC_CD = CD.COMM_CD) SVCNM , DVH.SVC_NUM , DVH.SVC_MGMT_NUM , DVH.FEE_PROD_ID , DVH.SVC_DTL_CL_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'SVC_DTL_CL_CD' AND DVH.SVC_DTL_CL_CD = CD.COMM_CD) SVCDTLCLNM , DVH.STM_FIR_REG_DATE , DVH.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID , DVH.MAIN_CNSL_CD_NM , DVH.SUB_CNSL_CD_NM , DVH.TYP_CNSL_CD_NM , DVH.ITM_CNSL_CD_NM , DVH.DTL_CNSL_CD_NM FROM DM_VOC_HST DVH , AD_COMM_CD CD1 , AD_COMM_CD CD2 , AD_COMM_CD CD3 , AD_COMM_CD CD4 , AD_COMM_CD CD5 , AD_COMM_CD CD6 , AD_COMM_CD CD7 WHERE DVH.SEQ_ID = #{seqId} AND ROWNUM = 1

-- 상태 이력 SELECT UUPSH.STM_FIR_REG_DATE , UUPSH.STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER , UUPSH.ERR_CD , UECM.ERR_NM , UECM.ERR_EXPL , UECM.PRG_STS_FG_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE UECM.PRG_STS_FG_CD = CD.COMM_CD AND COMM_GRP_CD = 'PRG_STS_FG_CD') PRG_STS_FG_Nm FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_MST UUPSM , UM_UPD_PLAN_STS_HST UUPSH , UM_ERR_CD_MST UECM WHERE UUPSM.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId}) AND UUPSH.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId}) AND UUPSM.EXE_SCH_ID = #{exeSchId} AND TO_CHAR(UUPSM.STM_FIR_REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF') = #{stmFirRegDate} AND UUPSH.ERR_CD = UECM.ERR_CD(+) AND UUPSH.EXE_SCH_ID = UUPSM.EXE_SCH_ID ORDER BY UUPSH.STM_FIR_REG_DATE DESC, UECM.PRG_STS_FG_CD DESC

select NVL(upm.plan_nm,' ') planNm ,NVL2(sm.stb_sw_ver,DECODE(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,10,4),NULL,TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,7,3)),TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(sm.stb_sw_ver,10,4)),' ') swFileVer ,NVL(fd.sw_nm,' ') swFileNm ,NVL((select CD.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_CD = SM.UPD_SCOP_CD AND CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'UPD_SCOP_CD'),' ') cdNm1 from um_upd_plan_sw_map sm , UM_UPD_PLAN_MST upm , um_sw_mst fd where sm.plan_id = upm.plan_id AND sm.sw_id = fd.sw_id(+) AND upm.plan_id =#{planId}

SELECT a.ACC_DISTB_ID planNm , NVL2(a.ACC_SW_VER , DECODE(LENGTH(a.ACC_SW_VER), 6, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(a.ACC_SW_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(a.ACC_SW_VER,4,3)), a.ACC_SW_VER) , ' ') swFileVer , NVL(s.SW_NM, ' ') swFileNm , NVL((select CD.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD CD WHERE CD.COMM_CD = s.UPD_SCOP_CD AND CD.COMM_GRP_CD = 'UPD_SCOP_CD'),' ') cdNm1 FROM UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_MST a, UM_SW_MST s WHERE 1=1 AND a.ACC_DISTB_ID = #{planId} AND a.SW_ID = s.SW_ID

SELECT '' ,NVL(PS.MAC_ADDRESS,' ') "MAC주소"
,NVL(DECODE(LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM),10,'상용','테스트용' ),' ') "STB구분"
,NVL((SELECT SM.MODEL_NAME FROM STB_MODEL SM WHERE SM.MODEL_CODE = PS.MODEL_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "모델명"
,NVL((SELECT MCM.CUG_NM FROM DM_CUG_MST DCM ,MN_CUG_MST MCM WHERE STB.SERVICE_CODE = DCM.CUG_ID AND DCM.CUG_ID = MCM.CUG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "고객구분"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'SCRBR_TYP_CD' AND COMM.COMM_CD = SD.SCRBR_TYP_CD ), ' ') "가입자유형"
,' ' "MAC주소2"
,NVL(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM,' ') "서비스관리 번호"
, DDM.STB_ID "STB ID"
,NVL2(DDM.STB_SW_VER,DECODE(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,10,4),NULL,TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,7,3)),TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,10,4)),' ') "STB설치버전"
,NVL2(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,DECODE(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,10,4),NULL,TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,7,3)),TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,10,4)),' ') "STB계획버전"
,NVL(UUPM.PLAN_NM,' ') "계획서명"
,NVL(DDM.PLAN_ID,' ') "PLAN_ID"
,NVL(TO_CHAR(DDM.STB_LAST_CONN_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'),' ') "최종접속일시"
,NVL(TO_CHAR(DDM.STB_SW_UPD_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), ' ') "최종업데이트 일자"
,NVL(DDM.UPD_YN, ' ') "Update대상"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'IPTV_STATUS_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.IPTV_STATUS_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "개통상태"
,NVL(SD.TBR_SO_CL_CD, ' ') "SO지역코드"
,NVL(DECODE(DDM.HDMI_POW,'1','사용함','0','사용 안함',NULL),' ') "TV전원제어"
,NVL(DECODE(DDM.RCU_PAIRING,'1','Y','0','N',NULL),' ') "RCU 페어링 여부"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_MODL_NM, ' ') "RCU 모델"
,NVL2(DADM.ACC_SW_VER, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DADM.ACC_SW_VER, 1, 3))|| '.' || TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DADM.ACC_SW_VER, 4, 3)), ' ') "RCU 버전"
,NVL2(ZL.CT_PVC_NM, ZL.CT_PVC_NM ||' '|| ZL.CT_GUN_GU_NM, ' ') "지역"
,NVL(STB.USER_NUM, ' ') "고객번호"
,NVL((SELECT AREA1_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST team, DM_DVC_MST device WHERE device.STB_ID = UPPER(DDM.STB_ID) AND team.AREA1_CD = device.AREA1_CD),' ') "정보센터"
,NVL(STB.USER_INIT_NUM, ' ') "최초고객가입자번호"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'ID_PACKAGE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.ID_PACKAGE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "가입상품"
,NVL((SELECT LISTAGG(B.DVC_GRP_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY B.DVC_GRP_NM) DVCGRPNM FROM DM_DVC_GRP_PSNL_MAP A ,DM_DVC_GRP_MST B WHERE A.DVC_GRP_ID = B.DVC_GRP_ID AND A.STB_ID = UPPER(DDM.STB_ID) GROUP BY A.STB_ID), ' ') "그룹명"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'NETWORK_BRAND_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.NETWORK_BRAND_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "NETWORK"
,NVL((SELECT DQTM.TEAM_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST DQTM WHERE DDM.TEAM_CD = DQTM.TEAM_CD AND ROWNUM =1),' ') AS "품질솔루션팀"
,NVL(TO_CHAR(DDM.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'),' ') || '(' || NVL(DECODE(DDM.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDM.STM_UPTM)||'일'),' ') || ')' AS "업타임 일시(업타임 경과시간)"
,NVL(DECODE(DDM.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDM.STM_UPTM)||'일'),' ') AS "업타임 경과시간"
,NVL(DDM.web_ui_ver, ' ') "Web UI"
,NVL(DDM.native_ui_ver, ' ') "Native UI"
,NVL(DDM.CLNT_IPADDR,' ') "내부 IP"
,NVL(DDM.CLNT_PUB_IPADDR,' ') "외부 IP"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_MAC_ADDR, ' ') "RCU MAC 주소"
,NVL((SELECT cd_nm FROM ad_comm_cd WHERE comm_grp_cd = 'ACC_BATTERY_STS_CD' AND comm_cd = DADM.acc_batt_sts_cd), ' ') "배터리 상태"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_BT_CONN_YN, ' ') "BT Connection 여부"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_PAIRING_YN, ' ') "BT 페어링 여부"
,NVL(DDM.RCU_MANUFR_CD,' ') "RCU 제조사"
,NVL(DDM.RCU_FIRM_VER,' ') "RCU 버전(STB)"
,NVL(DDM.EXE_SCH_ID, ' ') "EX_ID"
,NVL(UPPESL.EXE_SCH_NM , ' ') "수행계획서명"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'UPD_STS_FG_CD' AND COMM.COMM_CD = UPPESL.UPD_STS_FG_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) , ' ') "수행계획 상태"
FROM STB STB ,DM_DVC_MST DDM ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,UM_UPD_PLAN_MST UUPM ,STB_DTL SD ,STB_LOCATION SL ,ZNGM_ADDR ZA ,ZNGM_LDONG ZL ,DM_ACC_DVC_MST DADM ,UM_UPD_PLAN_EXE_SCH_LST UPPESL WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.PLAN_ID = UUPM.PLAN_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SD.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SL.STB_ID (+) AND SL.ADDR_ID = ZA.ADDR_ID (+) AND ZA.LDONG_CD = ZL.LDONG_CD (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DADM.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.EXE_SCH_ID = UPPESL.EXE_SCH_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
UPPER(#{type})
LOWER(#{type})
ORDER BY DDM.STB_ID OFFSET #{pageNo} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY ) PAGING )P

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM STB STB ,DM_DVC_MST DDM ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,UM_UPD_PLAN_MST UUPM ,STB_DTL SD ,STB_LOCATION SL ,ZNGM_ADDR ZA ,ZNGM_LDONG ZL ,DM_ACC_DVC_MST DADM WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.PLAN_ID = UUPM.PLAN_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SD.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SL.STB_ID (+) AND SL.ADDR_ID = ZA.ADDR_ID (+) AND ZA.LDONG_CD = ZL.LDONG_CD (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DADM.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
UPPER(#{type})
LOWER(#{type})

SELECT /*+ leading(PS) */ '' ,NVL(PS.MAC_ADDRESS,' ') "MAC주소"
,NVL(DECODE(LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM),10,'상용','테스트용' ),' ') "STB구분"
,NVL((SELECT SM.MODEL_NAME FROM STB_MODEL SM WHERE SM.MODEL_CODE = PS.MODEL_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "모델명"
,NVL((SELECT MCM.CUG_NM FROM DM_CUG_MST DCM ,MN_CUG_MST MCM WHERE STB.SERVICE_CODE = DCM.CUG_ID AND DCM.CUG_ID = MCM.CUG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "고객구분"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'SCRBR_TYP_CD' AND COMM.COMM_CD = SD.SCRBR_TYP_CD ), ' ') "가입자유형"
,' ' "MAC주소2"
,NVL(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM,' ') "서비스관리 번호"
, DDM.STB_ID "STB ID"
,NVL2(DDM.STB_SW_VER,DECODE(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,10,4),NULL,TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,7,3)),TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_VER,10,4)),' ') "STB설치버전"
,NVL2(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,DECODE(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,10,4),NULL,TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,7,3)),TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER,10,4)),' ') "STB계획버전"
,NVL(UUPM.PLAN_NM,' ') "계획서명"
,NVL(DDM.PLAN_ID,' ') "PLAN_ID"
,NVL(TO_CHAR(DDM.STB_LAST_CONN_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'),' ') "최종접속일시"
,NVL(TO_CHAR(DDM.STB_SW_UPD_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), ' ') "최종업데이트 일자"
,NVL(DDM.UPD_YN, ' ') "Update대상"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'IPTV_STATUS_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.IPTV_STATUS_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "개통상태"
,NVL(SD.TBR_SO_CL_CD, ' ') "SO지역코드"
,NVL(DECODE(DDM.HDMI_POW,'1','사용함','0','사용 안함',NULL),' ') "TV전원제어"
,NVL(DECODE(DDM.RCU_PAIRING,'1','Y','0','N',NULL),' ') "RCU 페어링 여부"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_MODL_NM, ' ') "RCU 모델"
,NVL2(DADM.ACC_SW_VER, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DADM.ACC_SW_VER, 1, 3))|| '.' || TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DADM.ACC_SW_VER, 4, 3)), ' ') "RCU 버전"
,NVL2(ZL.CT_PVC_NM, ZL.CT_PVC_NM ||' '|| ZL.CT_GUN_GU_NM, ' ') "지역"
,NVL(STB.USER_NUM, ' ') "고객번호"
,NVL((SELECT AREA1_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST team, DM_DVC_MST device WHERE device.STB_ID = UPPER(DDM.STB_ID) AND team.AREA1_CD = device.AREA1_CD),' ') "정보센터"
,NVL(STB.USER_INIT_NUM, ' ') "최초고객가입자번호"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'ID_PACKAGE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.ID_PACKAGE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "가입상품"
,NVL((SELECT LISTAGG(B.DVC_GRP_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY B.DVC_GRP_NM) DVCGRPNM FROM DM_DVC_GRP_PSNL_MAP A ,DM_DVC_GRP_MST B WHERE A.DVC_GRP_ID = B.DVC_GRP_ID AND A.STB_ID = UPPER(DDM.STB_ID) GROUP BY A.STB_ID), ' ') "그룹명"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'NETWORK_BRAND_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.NETWORK_BRAND_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') "NETWORK"
,NVL((SELECT DQTM.TEAM_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST DQTM WHERE DDM.TEAM_CD = DQTM.TEAM_CD AND ROWNUM =1),' ') AS "품질솔루션팀"
,NVL(TO_CHAR(DDM.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'),' ') || '(' || NVL(DECODE(DDM.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDM.STM_UPTM)||'일'),' ') || ')' AS "업타임 일시(업타임 경과시간)"
,NVL(DECODE(DDM.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDM.STM_UPTM)||'일'),' ') AS "업타임 경과시간"
,NVL(DDM.web_ui_ver, ' ') "Web UI"
,NVL(DDM.native_ui_ver, ' ') "Native UI"
,NVL(DDM.CLNT_IPADDR,' ') "내부 IP"
,NVL(DDM.CLNT_PUB_IPADDR,' ') "외부 IP"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_MAC_ADDR, ' ') "RCU MAC 주소"
,NVL((SELECT cd_nm FROM ad_comm_cd WHERE comm_grp_cd = 'ACC_BATTERY_STS_CD' AND comm_cd = DADM.acc_batt_sts_cd), ' ') "배터리 상태"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_BT_CONN_YN, ' ') "BT Connection 여부"
,NVL(DADM.ACC_PAIRING_YN, ' ') "BT 페어링 여부"
,NVL(DDM.RCU_MANUFR_CD,' ') "RCU 제조사"
,NVL(DDM.RCU_FIRM_VER,' ') "RCU 버전(STB)"
,NVL(DDM.EXE_SCH_ID, ' ') "EX_ID"
,NVL(UPPESL.EXE_SCH_NM , ' ') "수행계획서명"
,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'UPD_STS_FG_CD' AND COMM.COMM_CD = UPPESL.UPD_STS_FG_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) , ' ') "수행계획 상태"
FROM STB STB ,DM_DVC_MST DDM ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,UM_UPD_PLAN_MST UUPM ,STB_DTL SD ,STB_LOCATION SL ,ZNGM_ADDR ZA ,ZNGM_LDONG ZL ,DM_ACC_DVC_MST DADM ,UM_UPD_PLAN_EXE_SCH_LST UPPESL
,DM_DVC_GRP_MST GM ,DM_DVC_GRP_PSNL_MAP GPM
WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.PLAN_ID = UUPM.PLAN_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SD.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = SL.STB_ID (+) AND SL.ADDR_ID = ZA.ADDR_ID (+) AND ZA.LDONG_CD = ZL.LDONG_CD (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DADM.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.EXE_SCH_ID = UPPESL.EXE_SCH_ID (+)
AND GM.DVC_GRP_ID = GPM.DVC_GRP_ID(+) AND DDM.STB_ID = GPM.STB_ID AND GM.DVC_GRP_FG_CD = '02' AND UPPER(GM.DVC_GRP_NM) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{deviceGroup} || '%')
AND DDM.UPD_YN = #{searchUpdYn}
AND PS.MAC_ADDRESS = LOWER(#{macAddress})
AND ${otherCondition} = #{otherTxt}
AND STB.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId})
AND ${versionCondition} BETWEEN #{toVersion} AND #{fromVersion}
AND ${versionCondition} = #{toVersion}
AND ${versionCondition} >= #{toVersion}
AND ${versionCondition} <= #{toVersion}
AND DDM.TEAM_CD IN
#{type}
AND PS.MODEL_CODE IN
#{type}
AND TRIM(STB.SERVICE_CODE) IN
#{type}
AND STB.NETWORK_BRAND_CODE IN
#{type}
AND STB.IPTV_STATUS_CODE IN
#{type}
AND SD.SCRBR_TYP_CD IN
#{type}
AND DDM.STM_UPTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{fromUptm}||'00:00:00','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{toUptm}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND DDM.STM_UPTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{fromUptm}||'00:00:00','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{fromUptm}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND DDM.STM_UPTM >= TO_DATE(#{fromUptm})
AND DDM.STM_UPTM <= TO_DATE(#{fromUptm})+0.99999
AND DDM.STM_UPTM BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-#{overTimeTo}) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-#{overTimeFrom})+0.99999
AND DDM.STM_UPTM BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-#{overTime}) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-#{overTime})+0.99999
AND DDM.STM_UPTM <= TRUNC(SYSDATE-#{overTime})+0.99999
AND DDM.STM_UPTM >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-#{overTime})
AND LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM) = 10
AND LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM) != 10
ORDER BY DDM.STB_ID OFFSET #{pageNo} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY ) PAGING )P

SELECT A.STB_ID , A.USER_NUM , A.USER_SERVICE_NUM ,(SELECT team_nm FROM DM_DVC_MST ddm, DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST dqtm WHERE ddm.team_cd = dqtm.team_cd AND ddm.stb_id = A.STB_ID AND rownum=1) AS TEAM_NM , A.USER_INIT_NUM , B.ADDRESS FULL_ADDR , ZL.CT_PVC_NM ||' '|| ZL.CT_GUN_GU_NM ADDRESS , NVL(C.WEB_UI_VER, ' ') WEB_UI_VER , NVL(C.NATIVE_UI_VER, ' ') NATIVE_UI_VER ,NVL(TO_CHAR(C.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'),' ') STM_UPTM ,NVL(DECODE(C.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(C.STM_UPTM)||'일'),' ') AS OVERUPTIME , A.ID_PACKAGE ,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'NETWORK_BRAND_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = A.NETWORK_BRAND_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') CDNM1 , A.NETWORK_BRAND_CODE ,NVL((SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'ID_PACKAGE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = A.ID_PACKAGE AND ROWNUM = 1),' ') CDNM2 , NVL(( SELECT AREA1_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST team, DM_DVC_MST device WHERE device.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId}) AND team.AREA1_CD = device.AREA1_CD),' ') AREA1_NM , C.WEB_UI_VER , C.NATIVE_UI_VER , NVL(C.CLNT_IPADDR, ' ') CLNT_IPADDR , NVL(C.CLNT_PUB_IPADDR, ' ') CLNT_PUB_IPADDR , SD.TBR_SO_CL_CD , DECODE(C.HDMI_POW,'1','사용함','0','사용 안함',' ') HDMI_POW FROM STB A , STB_LOCATION B , DM_DVC_MST C , ZNGM_ADDR ZA , ZNGM_LDONG ZL , STB_DTL SD WHERE A.STB_ID = B.STB_ID AND B.ADDR_ID = ZA.ADDR_ID (+) AND ZA.LDONG_CD = ZL.LDONG_CD (+) AND A.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId}) AND C.STB_ID = A.STB_ID AND A.STB_ID = SD.STB_ID (+)

SELECT LISTAGG(B.DVC_GRP_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY B.DVC_GRP_NM) DVCGRPNM FROM DM_DVC_GRP_PSNL_MAP A ,DM_DVC_GRP_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.DVC_GRP_ID = B.DVC_GRP_ID AND A.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId}) GROUP BY A.STB_ID

SELECT DDM.STB_ID FROM STB STB ,DM_DVC_MST DDM ,PHYSICAL_STB PS
WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
UPPER(#{type})
LOWER(#{type})

SELECT UDM.STB_SW_VER, UDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER, UDM.STB_LAST_CONN_DATE, DUVM.STB_UI_VER FROM STB STB, DM_DVC_MST UDM, DM_UI_VER_MAP DUVM WHERE STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM = #{userSvcNum} AND STB.STB_ID = UDM.STB_ID AND (TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(UDM.stb_sw_ver,1,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(UDM.stb_sw_ver,4,3))||'.'||TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(UDM.stb_sw_ver,7,3))||'-'||SUBSTR(UDM.stb_sw_ver,10,4)) = DUVM.STB_FULL_VER(+)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DDM.STB_ID , DADM.ACC_MODL_ID , DADM.STB_MAC_ADDR , NVL(DADM.ACC_MAC_ADDR, ' ') ACC_MAC_ADDR , NVL(DADM.ACC_MODL_NM, ' ') ACC_MODL_NM , DADM.DVC_FG_CD , DADM.ACC_SW_VER , NVL(DADM.ACC_PAIRING_YN,' ') ACC_PAIRING_YN , DADM.ACC_BATT_STS_CD , NVL((select cd_nm from ad_comm_cd where comm_grp_cd = 'ACC_BATTERY_STS_CD' and comm_cd = DADM.acc_batt_sts_cd), ' ') acc_batt_sts_nm , NVL(DADM.ACC_BT_CONN_YN,' ') ACC_BT_CONN_YN , DADM.STM_FIR_REG_DATE, DADM.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID, DADM.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, DADM.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID , NVL(DDM.RCU_FIRM_VER, ' ') RCU_FIRM_VER , NVL(DDM.RCU_MANUFR_CD, ' ') RCU_MANUFR_CD , DECODE(DDM.RCU_PAIRING,'1','Y','0','N',' ') RCU_PAIRING FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM , DM_ACC_DVC_MST DADM WHERE DDM.STB_ID = DADM.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = UPPER(#{stbId}) ORDER BY STM_FIR_REG_DATE DESC ) WHERE rownum = 1

-- 에러 상태 이력 : selectListUpdateStateErr SELECT MAX(TO_CHAR(UUPEM.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS')) STM_LAST_UPD_DATE , UUPEM.ERR_CD , UECM.ERR_NM ERR_NM , COUNT(*) ERR_CNT FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_ERR_MST UUPEM JOIN UM_ERR_CD_MST UECM ON UUPEM.ERR_CD = UECM.ERR_CD WHERE UUPEM.PLAN_ID = #{planId} AND UUPEM.EXE_SCH_ID = #{exeSchId} AND UUPEM.STB_ID = #{stbId} AND UUPEM.MAC_ADDR = #{macAddr} GROUP BY UUPEM.ERR_CD, UECM.ERR_NM ORDER BY MAX(UUPEM.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE) DESC
